title: Auto Scroll
description: Automatically scroll through your hotbar quickly for easy block palette randomization.
body:

---

Automatically scroll through your hotbar quickly for easy block palette randomization. There is no default keybinding, so head to the normal Minecraft keybinds menu under the "Miscellaneous" section to assign one.

### Warning about use on servers

It is 100% possible that servers will pick this up as a cheat. The speed at which this scrolls is typically only possible with either a macro or a mouse with a "zero friction" scroll wheel, like those made by Logitech. Use on servers at your own risk!
